changes.description: Pre-fetch all nodes into a dict cache at start of impact_analysis(); replaced two storage.get_node() N+1 calls (BFS loop + results loop) with dict lookups
Removed _query_node_name() helper; pre-fetch all node names into name_lookup dict; replaced per-member storage.get_node() with dict lookup
Added _hybrid_search lazy attribute and _get_hybrid_search() method; updated search() to try HybridSearch (BM25+fuzzy+semantic RRF) first with CONTAINS fallback
